subcodes.title: Words to the friends, spoken on 1915-04-09
subcodes.first_line: These wretched soldiers die for the sake of some earth, which is the lowest form of creation, and do not know why they are slain. Consider how some are refined and how some abase themselves.
subcodes.first_line_orig: این مردم بیچاره کشته میشوند و نمیدانند برای چه جانهای خود را فدای خاک میکنند خاک که انزل موجودات است
subcodes.subjects: @consumption of meat; vegetarianism; diet, @martyrs and martyrdom, @spiritual transformation
